title: [Dessert Vibes, Confectionary]
description: The room is of simple, makeshift construction, with a driftwood floor and a vaulted ceiling.  The room is also exceptionally colorful, with all surfaces painted in a riotous landscape of bright hues.  A desert vista graces the walls, with sea green cacti sprouting forth from magenta sands. The sky, drawn into the ceiling in peacock blue, is set in perpetual morning, with a violet sun over a painted wooden door flanked by azure clouds.  Above the sun, a broad sign is nailed to the wall.
